metadata.notes: Adapted from a DailyMed label. Clinical evaluation artifact only. Level-2 contraindicação: eGFR thresholds distinguish contraindicação from not-recommended initiation.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

provenance.source_organization: DailyMed / U.S. National Library of Medicine
provenance.adaptation_method: Parafraseado e condensado em um cenário sintético, preservando o padrão relacional necessário para a avaliação do benchmark. O caso não substitui o documento-fonte.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Artefato apenas para avaliação; não use como aconselhamento jurídico, tributário, clínico, de operações em nuvem, imigração ou política institucional.

representations.raw:
Metformin renal-function note.

Seção A. Baseline renal check. Before initiating metformin, obtain an estimated glomerular filtration rate, or eGFR. During therapy, renal function deve be monitored at least annually and more frequently in patients at risk for renal impairment.

Seção B. eGFR below 30. Metformin is contraindicado in patients whose eGFR is below 30 mL/min/1.73 m2.

Seção C. eGFR 30 to 45. Starting metformin is not recommended when eGFR is between 30 and 45 mL/min/1.73 m2, embora this category is distinct from the below-30 contraindicação.
representations.annotated:
Metformin renal-function note.

<precondition id="P1">Seção A. Baseline renal check. Before initiating metformin, obtain an estimated glomerular filtration rate, or eGFR. During therapy, renal function deve be monitored at least annually and more frequently in patients at risk for renal impairment.</precondition>

<contraindication id="C1" condition="eGFR < 30">Seção B. eGFR below 30. Metformin is contraindicado in patients whose eGFR is below 30 mL/min/1.73 m2.</contraindication>

<rule id="R1" scope="30 <= eGFR <= 45">Seção C. eGFR 30 to 45. Starting metformin is not recommended when eGFR is between 30 and 45 mL/min/1.73 m2, embora this category is distinct from the below-30 contraindicação.</rule>
representations.compiled:
pré-condiçãos:
  - id: P1
    before_initiation: obtain_eGFR
    monitoring: at_least_annually_or_more_if_at_risk
contraindicaçãos:
  - id: C1
    condition:
      eGFR: '<30 mL/min/1.73m2'
    effect: metformin_contraindicado
regras:
  - id: R1
    condition:
      eGFR: '30-45 mL/min/1.73m2'
    effect: initiation_not_recommended
    distinct_from_contraindicação: true

query: A patient is being considered for new metformin therapy. Their eGFR is 38 mL/min/1.73 m2. É this the below-30 contraindicação, and deve metformin be initiated as usual?

gold_answer.full: It is not the below-30 contraindicação, but initiation não deve proceed as usual. The eGFR 30–45 category is distinct from the contraindicação threshold, yet the label says starting metformin is not recommended in that range.
gold_answer.minimal: No below-30 contraindicação, but initiation is not recommended porque eGFR is 30–45.
required_relations: pré-condição:eGFR deve be checked before initiation
contraindicação vs not-recommended threshold deve be distinguished

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que deve be obtained before initiating metformin?
At what eGFR is metformin contraindicado in this note?
Qual/O que does the note say about starting metformin at eGFR 30 to 45?

composition_hallucination: Start metformin as usual porque the eGFR is above 30.
Metformin is absolutely contraindicado at eGFR 38 porque it is below 45.
wrong_escalation: Stop all diabetes medications porque eGFR is below 45.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragmento is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A patient has eGFR 58 before starting metformin, with no other listed issue. É the eGFR 30–45 initiation warning triggered?
controls.negative_control_gold: No. eGFR 58 does not trigger the 30–45 initiation-not-recommended regra or the below-30 contraindicação.
